stem: Utility system software keeps a computer running smoothly.
review_notes: 2024 J277/01 Q3(b). Six-mark cloze. The bank follows the paper exactly; not all words are used.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Complete the description using words from the bank. Not every word is used.

part_config.text:
{{w1}} software changes data using a {{w2}}. If the changed data is intercepted, it cannot be {{w3}}. This software does not stop the data from being intercepted.

{{w4}} software analyses the data on a disk to find files that have been split and stored in separate locations. The split files are moved to be {{w5}} in storage and the free space is moved together. This does not provide more storage space on the disk, instead it makes the {{w6}} of the data faster because the read head does not have to move as far to access the next part of the file.
